name: Key Vault accessible from public network
description: The Key Vault has public network access enabled without network ACL restrictions. An internet-accessible Key Vault dramatically increases the attack surface for credential theft and secret exfiltration.
remediation: Restrict Key Vault network access: Set Default Action to 'Deny' and add specific VNet/IP rules, or disable public network access entirely and use Private Endpoints. Use Azure RBAC for access control instead of vault access policies.
